summary: 217 tests passed, 99.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: Goal section validated: minimum 50 characters (boundary: 50 passes, 49 fails)
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _validate_min_length checking sections['Goal'] >= 50 chars. Tests: test_goal_exactly_50_chars_passes (boundary 50), test_goal_49_chars_fails (boundary 49), test_goal_empty_fails (empty). Validation uses sections dict to check raw text length.

completion_promises.criterion_text: System Prompt validated: minimum 100 characters (boundary: 100 passes, 99 fails)
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _validate_min_length checking sections['System Prompt'] >= 100 chars. Tests: test_system_prompt_exactly_100_chars_passes (boundary 100), test_system_prompt_99_chars_fails (boundary 99).
Implemented _validate_min_length checking sections['Generation Guidelines'] >= 100 chars. Tests: test_guidelines_exactly_100_chars_passes (boundary 100), test_guidelines_99_chars_fails (boundary 99).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Evaluation Criteria: at least 3 criteria required (boundary: 3 passes, 2 fails)
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _validate_evaluation_criteria checking len(parsed.evaluation_criteria) >= 3. Tests: test_exactly_3_criteria_passes (boundary 3), test_2_criteria_fails (boundary 2), test_1_criterion_fails. Uses model_construct() to bypass Pydantic min_length=3 for negative tests.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Evaluation Criteria: names checked for Python keyword collision (class, import, etc.)
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented both Pydantic model-level validation (field_validator on EvaluationCriterion.name) and cross-section validator check in _validate_evaluation_criteria. Tests: test_python_keyword_as_criterion_name_rejected_by_model (parametrized: class, import, return, for, if), test_keyword_name_detected_by_validator (model_construct bypass), test_invalid_identifier_detected_by_validator.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Output Schema: messages and metadata keys required
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _validate_output_schema checking {'messages', 'metadata'} - set(parsed.output_schema.keys()). Tests: test_valid_output_schema_passes, test_missing_messages_key_fails, test_missing_metadata_key_fails, test_missing_both_keys_fails.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Source Documents: mode restricted to standard or vlm (reject ocr)
completion_promises.evidence: Mode restriction is enforced by the Pydantic model SourceDocument(mode: Literal['standard', 'vlm']). The validator adds a second line of defence via _validate_source_documents checking at least 1 entry exists. Tests verify model-level rejection of 'ocr' mode exists in test_models.py. Empty source_documents tested via test_empty_source_docs_fails.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Layer Routing: both behaviour and knowledge rows required
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _validate_layer_routing checking {'behaviour', 'knowledge'} - set(parsed.layer_routing.keys()). Tests: test_both_layers_present_passes, test_missing_knowledge_fails, test_missing_behaviour_fails, test_both_missing_fails.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Reasoning split: >= 70% of generation targets must be reasoning type (boundary: 70% passes, 69% fails)
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _validate_reasoning_split computing reasoning_count/total_count * 100 >= 70. Uses counts as authoritative (not percentages). Tests: test_exactly_70_percent_reasoning_passes (70/100), test_69_percent_reasoning_fails (69/100), test_60_percent_reasoning_fails (60/100), test_100_percent_reasoning_passes, test_various_counts_at_or_above_70_percent_pass (700/1000, 7/10, 71/100).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Percentages in Generation Targets are advisory; counts are authoritative
completion_promises.evidence: The _validate_reasoning_split function computes the split from counts (sum(t.count for t in targets)), not from any percentage field. Tests: test_various_counts_at_or_above_70_percent_pass verifies counts 700/300, 7/3, 71/29 all pass regardless of any percentage values.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Multiple validation failures reported together in a single error
completion_promises.evidence: validate_goal_config collects all errors in a list[tuple[str, str]], then raises a single GoalValidationError with all failures attached as err.failures. Tests: test_multiple_failures_aggregated (Goal + System Prompt + Evaluation Criteria all in one error), test_all_structural_failures_aggregated (all 9 sections failing simultaneously).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Error messages include section name and human-readable description
completion_promises.evidence: Each failure tuple is (section_name, human_readable_message). The GoalValidationError str() includes all section names and messages. Tests: test_error_has_failures_attribute, test_error_message_includes_all_sections, test_single_failure_still_uses_failures_attribute.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran ruff check on both validators.py and test_validators.py — 'All checks passed!' after removing unused imports (keyword, MagicMock).
